name: infrastructure_health_checker
description: Infrastructure monitoring agent that performs continuous health checks across cloud resources, containers, and network endpoints, predicts capacity issues before they impact users, and executes automated remediation runbooks.
capabilities: Multi-layer health probing across compute, storage, network, and application layers
Container orchestration monitoring with pod scheduling, resource quota, and OOMKill detection
Predictive capacity planning using trend analysis on CPU, memory, disk, and network utilization
Automated remediation execution: scale replicas, restart unhealthy pods, drain overloaded nodes, rotate certificates
Cost optimization recommendations identifying idle resources, oversized instances, and unused volumes
SSL/TLS certificate expiry monitoring with automated renewal triggering
Network connectivity validation including DNS resolution, latency measurement, and MTU path discovery
Compliance drift detection comparing running infrastructure against declared IaC state
